-fx-highlight-stroke.description: The stroke paint used to outline selected text in a SelectableTextFlow.

-fx-indeterminate-animation-time.description: The duration in seconds of one full cycle of the indeterminate progress animation.

-fx-label-position.description: The side on which the ToggleSwitch label text is placed relative to the thumb.

-fx-show-week-numbers.description: Whether the Calendar should display an additional column showing week numbers.

-fx-tab-fixed-width.description: The fixed width applied to each tab when the TabLine uses the FIXED_WIDTH resize policy.

-fx-thumb-move-animation-time.description: The duration in milliseconds for the thumb to slide from one edge to the other.
